name: 2 Tier Corner Shelf Clear - Brightroom™
description:
Maximize the corner space of your vanity with the 2 Tier Corner Shelf from Brightroom™. This clear shelf features a two-tiered design to give you ample space for cosmetics, skincare, bath canisters and more. Made of sturdy plastic, this corner shelf adds a fun addition to your bath space, vanity or any other area you'd like to have a bit more storage space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
